paywall.dashboard.lose2: Weak-area flashcard and drill nudges from your misses

paywall.exams.intro: Timed practice exams draw from your tier’s server-side pool. Checkout enables full-length attempts, autosave, and score history.

paywall.exams.lose1: Score history and pacing that match authorization-to-test timing
paywall.exams.lose2: Saved practice exam attempts tied to your pathway

paywall.exams.title: Unlock full access
paywall.passPromise.heading: Will this help me pass?
paywall.passPromise.lead: You earn the pass—NurseNest trains what regulators test: prioritization, safety, and scope under time. Items include full teaching rationales (not answer keys). Upgrading adds the full scoped bank, weak-area routing, and saved history so you close gaps before test day.
paywall.safeToTryLine: Safe to try first: previews and caps are there so you can judge item quality and rationales before any paid plan.
paywall.preview.bankSizeLine: Live question bank: {{count}}+ items (updates as we publish).
paywall.preview.contentFreshness: This matches the homepage preview item. A paid plan unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank, rationales on every option, and cross-device review history.
paywall.preview.heading: Sample question & rationale
paywall.preview.lead: Every item includes teaching rationales—here is a quick preview.
paywall.preview.proofIntro: What’s in the library right now
paywall.preview.neutralProofBody: We couldn’t load live counts just now—your connection or our servers may be busy. Premium still unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank, lessons, and rationales; see Pricing for current plans.
paywall.preview.qualitativeProofBody: Counts vary by pathway and how often we publish. Premium gives you the full scoped question bank, complete lessons, and teaching rationales for your license—the preview below shows the same item quality subscribers use.
paywall.preview.rationaleDepthHint: Full step-by-step rationale (typical items include prioritization logic, safety checks, and what to watch next).
paywall.objections.title: Last-minute questions
paywall.objections.proofWithCount: You are looking at the same item style as subscribers: exam-style stem, four options, full rationale. The live bank currently lists {{count}}+ questions—your tier unlocks the full scoped pool.
paywall.objections.proofNoCount: You are looking at the same item style as subscribers: exam-style stem, four options, full rationale. A paid tier unlocks the full pathway-scoped pool and saved review history.
paywall.objections.proofNeutral: You are looking at the same item style as subscribers: exam-style stem, four options, full rationale. When counts load, they reflect the live bank for your pathway—upgrade unlocks the full pool and saved review history.
paywall.objections.worthIt.q: What do I get before I pay?
paywall.objections.worthIt.a: Previews and capped practice so you see the interface, rationale depth, and pacing. A subscription unlocks the full bank, complete lessons, exam modes, and cross-device history for your tier—nothing hidden behind a different product.
paywall.objections.different.q: Why choose NurseNest over other prep apps?
paywall.objections.different.a: Pathway-scoped lessons and questions in one workspace with readiness signals tied to your license—not a generic quiz feed. You already saw the item quality in preview; paid access adds volume, weak-area routing, and persistence.
paywall.objections.passExam.q: Will this actually help me pass?
paywall.objections.passExam.a: You earn the pass on exam day. NurseNest trains the judgment the NCLEX-style exams measure: prioritization, safety, and elimination thinking—with full rationales on every option and analytics that show what still needs reps.
paywall.objections.ifStayFree.q: What if I stay on the free tier?
paywall.objections.ifStayFree.a: You keep preview access and caps stay in place. If you need the full bank, lesson bodies, timed exams, and saved analytics for your exam window, upgrade when you are ready—cancel from the billing portal if plans change.
paywall.objections.upToDate.a: Items are written for licensure-style decisions and maintained for the US and Canadian pathways we support—updated as expectations evolve. They are not leaked exam items; they train the same reasoning you will use on test day.
paywall.footerHint: Most candidates who feel exam-ready mixed steady question reps, full rationales, and at least one full practice exam in the weeks before their date, not a single cram block.
paywall.lessons.intro: Lesson previews show structure; subscribers get complete bodies, module progress, and the lesson pool that matches your pathway.
paywall.lessons.lose0: Full lesson content beyond preview limits
paywall.lessons.lose1: Completion tracking and resume across modules
paywall.lessons.lose2: Cross-lesson sequences aligned to your exam scope
paywall.lessons.progress: Any preview modules you opened still count toward your study story. Upgrade to keep progress and unlock full depth.
paywall.lessons.title: Unlock full access
paywall.questions.intro: Previews and capped runs show you the interface; a paid tier unlocks the full pathway-scoped pool, full rationales on every option, weak-area routing, and cross-device history.
paywall.questions.lose0: Full rationales and review history for every item you have attempted
paywall.questions.lose1: Unlimited or tier-scoped bank access (not preview caps)
paywall.questions.lose2: Category analytics that persist across sessions and devices
paywall.questions.progress: You have already started prep. Your recent attempts count. Upgrade to keep weak-topic lists, streaks, and full review instead of losing depth after each preview.
paywall.questions.title: Unlock full access
paywall.ctaDecisionLine: If this preview matches how you want to prepare, the next step is straightforward: compare plans when you are ready. Pricing lays out each tier in plain language—no surprise steps.
paywall.sampleExploreLead: Browse sample marketing pages for your track (same item style as the app):
paywall.tierLine.ALLIED: Allied health track: lessons and practice scoped to your discipline and region.
paywall.tierLine.default: Checkout unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank, lessons, and tools for the exam track tied to your account.
paywall.tierLine.LVN_LPN: LVN/LPN track: practical-nursing–style practice and lessons aligned to your pathway.
paywall.tierLine.NP: NP track: advanced-practice items and lessons aligned to your focus area.
paywall.tierLine.RN: RN track: licensure-style practice, pathway lessons, and readiness tools for your selected pathway.
paywall.tierLine.RPN: RPN track: Canadian practical nursing practice scoped to your registration pathway.
